message.body: i busted some blood vessels playing fucking dogshit stupid fucking garbage piece of shit game
it's the worst game i've ever played but if i don't get 350 i may as well not be alive
i've been 20 off for 60+ hours of gameplay
i'm just fucking useless and terrible so i can't even come close again
closest run i had died at the boss with a score of like 300
that is horrible i'm so sorry
i also took a week or two off to play outer wilds and it helped a little bit
but now i want to die again
this morning i had a run where i was almost fucking 30 ahead a little over halfway through the run
and i threw it away because i'm terrible
maybe i'll chalk this shitty session up to the one (1) alcoholic beverage i had while playing
Rain World is a much longer game
it's hard to say because both games length varies wildly depending on who is playing
it's just the kind of game that doesn't care about the player's feelings to a degree
oh yeah i have to play TUNIC too
I have too many games to play
i was paying half attention bc i had to message someone, were you talking about minesweeper? or wonderful
holy shit that skip is awesome
surely the run is not valid if you do skips.............
ohhh yeah that one is hilarious
i mean there's an argument to be made that every secret song except pick-a-pipe is religious
he was too busy making It to make The 😭
this song is just really quiet
i have called you preacher, i have called you son
i'm gonna make needle YUH!!!! good luck. still here just trying to focus my attention elsewhere
you would care if it was fall guys...
i miss the early days of cn3 speedrunning where i could tell bummer to go to fortnite and he did
i cant tell if that meow was you or the cat
ok so when do i accept the speedrun?
i'll message you first of june then
and suddenly the brits were happy
oh yeah i call tea diluted water
tried it a few times, tastes like water with a vague taste of something else, but nowhere near enough to matter
catJAM best song in the game catJAM
huh, never would have guessed this plays here
oh golly this is quite a run
you cant just beat the entirety of 31 in the time it takes me to do a save what the heck
i think this has funky potential
im on like 74, with jump refreshers
I had to stop a good bit on the carpal tunnel save cause I have that !
i haven't even passed the first screen yet...
yeah im surprised I went that far, I blame it on lack of stuff to play
i think i have it downloaded
i think i have it downloaded?
i seem to have it downloaded
but yeah I still gotta write kale an angry letter for that one save, was so upset at it
the one called "the three tunnels of carpal"
I'd love to have this play while sitting on a bench looking at my uni burn down
i'm just out here tryna get the bag but these saves be blocking my shots
i dont even know where i'm coming from
if cats were real they would be jamming rn
shoutout to all my fake cats who werent able to get a hold of the special elixir
u dont know the skip here?
so u doing the fortnite secret too or nah
finding the dotkid skip is my biggest regret
u gotta keep dotkid deathless for like 5 screens
when u beeat explosive you could switch fexplosive fridays with fortnite fridays
I like that stage outside the one refresher with like a 8 pixel gap to shoot it
nah in the one you just did
I do love the boshy stage though it's probably my favorite
its from ninja gaiden but not sure which one
me when the church does free food giveaway
it is actually nice to be able to watch this run now, I picked a good time to actually play it
this might actually be my favorite part of 31
yeah pretty much, I knew barely anything
this is my favorite music in the game
was also my first stage pretty sure
yeah i made this background in like 10 minutes but I think it fits decently well
yeah it looks brilliant with this
i don't remember at all what my first path was
I think bad house was my last
I do remember where I am still stuck...
i would never play it on my own
your voice is kinda low btw
it sounded like that helped, did you move closer to the mic?
i really like that bottom left jump
it was strangely not one of the problemjumps in that save for me
we might be about equally good on that jump and I just extraordinarily suck at some others
i have no idea which save is which
on the screen where this save starts the bottom center jump was one of my least favorite
you mean the savetext not literally the save i was so confused
that was kale's version of jack world
the one after the water was my least favorite in this area maybe?
oh right so that the apples can bounce
i still can't believe plasma didn't replace this clock
i drew it, it's definitely not beautiful lol
yeah i coded the timer for this area
it's like my one part of CN3
but that doesn't mean it doesn't look out of place to me lol
I was actually gonna ask why you got added to the readme
and i think a minor bug with wall shoot jump bruh?
thought it might be for testing but wasnt sure if a hard needle game was something youd wanna do
i doubt kale would ask me to do this anyway tbh
i'd probably have done it if he asked
i also coded the fruit wall thing in boshy
meant to be easily adjustable so he can make his own versions
it's like 3rd screen of boshy or something
darn skipping boshy parts is messed up
skipped in boshy runs, no idea about cn3 runs
glad they remade the graphics for this stage, boshy never quite got that right
time to ask kale for an auto splitter
anxkha is just a god at everything including splitting
yo ive been contacted about the psychologist tho so im gonna call back today
tbf its semi rushing me cause i am clueless on what i want tbh
absolute very minimum is genderfluid tho
how did u beat 85 when it's impossible
omg it's the i can't see screen
did you practice for this or are you just gaming
And you said you werent finishing today
im a clueless person, why do people consider this easier than cn1 92?
alright well i gotta sleep, so gg on the run

can you join vc so i can spam the yippee whenever you clear

Stayed up late because i believed in u
sorry, wasnt here the whole stream, whats your fav 31 area + non-31 floor?
